name: SSHT S&T Group Ltd.
business: SSHT S&T Group Ltd. provides business consulting services to small and medium-sized enterprises, including capital market research, back-office support, financial accounting, listing support, and support for mergers and acquisitions. Its primary focus is helping small and medium-sized enterprises become public companies on suitable markets and exchanges, currently on OTC Markets in the U.S., with plans to expand to domestic exchanges in China and the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The Company's principal clients are small and medium sized Chinese companies who seek its services to achieve their goal of becoming public companies.
sellsTo: small and medium sized Chinese companies
